text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the JBC Classic, and Smart Falcon
and I are handing out flyers for the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's just one more person, she wants to
share the joy of dirt racing with as many as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we always used to have flyers leftover, we
pass them all out this time, and a huge crowd
shows up at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the heightened enthusiasm and not
wanting the fervor to die down, Smart Falcon is
determined to give a good performance, both on
the track and in the winning concert.
